description: Supplier site master table for Oracle Purchasing and Accounts Payable. Each record represents a supplier site such as purchasing, pay, remit-to, or RFQ site and stores address, payment, tax, and operating-unit-specific controls used when transacting with suppliers.

columns.name: ADDRESS_STYLE
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: LANGUAGE
columns.description: Language code for the translated value stored in the row.

columns.name: PROVINCE
columns.description: Province or regional component of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: COUNTRY
columns.description: Country component of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: AREA_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying area for the record.

columns.name: PHONE
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence customer.

columns.name: SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the ship-to location used for logistics or receiving control.

columns.name: BILL_TO_LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the bill-to location used for supplier site or customer billing purposes.

columns.name: SHIP_VIA_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying ship via lookup for the record.

columns.name: FREIGHT_TERMS_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying freight terms lookup for the record.

columns.name: FOB_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying fob lookup for the record.

columns.name: INACTIVE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with inactive.

columns.name: FAX
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: FAX_AREA_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying fax area for the record.

columns.name: TELEX
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: TERMS_DATE_BASIS
columns.description: Basis used to determine which date should drive payment term calculation.

columns.name: DISTRIBUTION_SET_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the predefined distribution set used to default accounting information.

columns.name: ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: Liability account combination charged for the supplier invoice or payment accounting entry.

columns.name: PREPAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related prepay code combination record.

columns.name: PAY_GROUP_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying pay group lookup for the record.

columns.name: PAYMENT_PRIORITY
columns.description: Processing priority used when selecting transactions for payment.

columns.name: TERMS_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the payment terms definition applied to the transaction.

columns.name: INVOICE_AMOUNT_LIMIT
columns.description: Maximum invoice amount allowed based on the supplier or site control setup.

columns.name: PAY_DATE_BASIS_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying pay date basis lookup for the record.

columns.name: ALWAYS_TAKE_DISC_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether always take disc applies to the record.

columns.name: INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency in which the supplier invoice was entered.

columns.name: PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency used when payment is made or settled.

columns.name: COUNTY
columns.description: County or administrative district component of the address.

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the supplier site used by purchasing and payables transactions.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the supplier master record associated with the transaction.

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_CODE
columns.description: Business code identifying the supplier site.

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_CODE_ALT
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: PURCHASING_SITE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether purchasing site applies to the record.

columns.name: RFQ_ONLY_SITE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether rfq only site applies to the record.

columns.name: PAY_SITE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether pay site applies to the record.

columns.name: ATTENTION_AR_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether attention ar applies to the record.

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE1
columns.description: Address line 1 of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE2
columns.description: Address line 2 of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE3
columns.description: Address line 3 of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINES_ALT
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: CITY
columns.description: City component of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: STATE
columns.description: State or province code component of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: ZIP
columns.description: Postal code component of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: HOLD_ALL_PAYMENTS_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether hold all payments applies to the record.

columns.name: HOLD_FUTURE_PAYMENTS_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether hold future payments applies to the record.

columns.name: HOLD_REASON
columns.description: Reason explaining why the supplier site, invoice, or payment record was placed on hold.

columns.name: HOLD_UNMATCHED_INVOICES_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether hold unmatched invoices applies to the record.

columns.name: TAX_REPORTING_SITE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether tax reporting site applies to the record.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Oracle application identifier for the concurrent program that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.description: Concurrent program identifier for the process that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the concurrent program last updated the record.

columns.name: VALIDATION_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence validation nu.

columns.name: EXCLUDE_FREIGHT_FROM_DISCOUNT
columns.description: Indicates whether freight charges are excluded when payment discounts are calculated.

columns.name: BANK_CHARGE_BEARER
columns.description: Indicates which party bears bank charges associated with the payment or receipt settlement.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier that owns the transaction in a multi-org Oracle EBS environment.

columns.name: CHECK_DIGITS
columns.description: Check digits used to validate the business reference or external account number.

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE4
columns.description: Address line 4 of the supplier, customer, or remittance address.

columns.name: ALLOW_AWT_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether allow awt applies to the record.

columns.name: AWT_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the withholding tax group applied to the transaction.

columns.name: PAY_AWT_GROUP_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related pay awt group record.

columns.name: DEFAULT_PAY_SITE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related default pay site record.

columns.name: PAY_ON_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying pay on for the record.

columns.name: PAY_ON_RECEIPT_SUMMARY_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying pay on receipt summary for the record.

columns.name: TP_HEADER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related tp header record.

columns.name: ECE_TP_LOCATION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying ece tp location for the record.

columns.name: PCARD_SITE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether pcard site applies to the record.

columns.name: MATCH_OPTION
columns.description: Matching control option that determines whether invoice matching is performed at purchase order or receipt level.

columns.name: COUNTRY_OF_ORIGIN_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying country of origin for the record.

columns.name: FUTURE_DATED_PAYMENT_CCID
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: CREATE_DEBIT_MEMO_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether create debit memo applies to the record.

columns.name: SUPPLIER_NOTIF_METHOD
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: EMAIL_ADDRESS
columns.description: Email address used for supplier, customer, or party communication.

columns.name: PRIMARY_PAY_SITE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether primary pay site applies to the record.

columns.name: SHIPPING_CONTROL
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: SELLING_COMPANY_IDENTIFIER
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: GAPLESS_INV_NUM_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether gapless inv num applies to the record.

columns.name: DUNS_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence duns nu.

columns.name: LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the address or inventory location referenced by the record.

columns.name: PARTY_SITE_ID
columns.description: Party site associated with the supplier, customer, or payment record.

columns.name: TOLERANCE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related tolerance record.

columns.name: SERVICES_TOLERANCE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related services tolerance record.

columns.name: RETAINAGE_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value retainage for the transaction.

columns.name: EDI_ID_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence edi id nu.

columns.name: VAT_REGISTRATION_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence vat registration.

columns.name: LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying language for the record.

columns.name: PAYMENT_METHOD_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup code identifying the method used to settle the transaction.

columns.name: BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with bank account.

columns.name: BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence bank account.

columns.name: BANK_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence bank.

columns.name: BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control bank account processing.

columns.name: CURRENT_CATALOG_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence current catalog.

columns.name: VAT_CODE
columns.description: Tax classification code applied to the transaction.

columns.name: AP_TAX_ROUNDING_RULE
columns.description: Rounding adjustment associated with ap tax rounding rule.

columns.name: AUTO_TAX_CALC_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether auto tax calc applies to the record.

columns.name: AUTO_TAX_CALC_OVERRIDE
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether amount includes tax applies to the record.

columns.name: OFFSET_VAT_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying offset vat for the record.

columns.name: BANK_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence bank nu.

columns.name: BANK_BRANCH_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control bank branch processing.

columns.name: OFFSET_TAX_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether offset tax applies to the record.

columns.name: REMITTANCE_EMAIL
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: EDI_TRANSACTION_HANDLING
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: EDI_PAYMENT_METHOD
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: EDI_PAYMENT_FORMAT
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: EDI_REMITTANCE_METHOD
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: EDI_REMITTANCE_INSTRUCTION
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: EXCLUSIVE_PAYMENT_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether exclusive payment applies to the record.

columns.name: CAGE_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying cage for the record.

columns.name: LEGAL_BUSINESS_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with legal business.

columns.name: DOING_BUS_AS_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with doing bus as.

columns.name: DIVISION_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with division.

columns.name: SMALL_BUSINESS_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying small business for the record.

columns.name: CCR_COMMENTS
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: DEBARMENT_START_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with debarment start.

columns.name: DEBARMENT_END_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with debarment end.

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Current processing status of the transaction within the Oracle application flow.

columns.name: END_DATE_ACTIVE
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: ACK_LEAD_TIME
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier site used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

business_questions: Show supplier site details for purchasing and payment processing.
Find pay sites and purchasing sites for a supplier.
Display address and remittance information by supplier site.
Show supplier sites used on Payables invoices.
Identify supplier sites on payment hold.
List supplier sites by operating unit and payment method.
Show remit-to site setup and banking attributes.
Find inactive or future-dated supplier sites.
